title: SQ Professional Fionna Insulated Hot Pot Set 3pc Food Pot Insulated Casserole Serving Dish Set with Lid Thermal Food Container Keep Food Warm & Cold 1-1.5-2.5L (Beige)
features: Meal Serving: The insulated hot pot set, with its special P.U. insulation and superior stainless steel liner, is perfect for serving hot dishes like soups, curries, and stews. hot pot insulated food warmer insulation helps maintain warmth for hours, ensuring your meals stay hot from the kitchen to the dining table.

Buffet-Style Dining: Thermal insulated serving dishes Ideal for gatherings or family meals, the set allows you to keep various dishes—such as rice, noodles, sauces, or gravies—warm throughout the event. The insulation ensures food stays at the right temperature without needing to be reheated.

Picnics or Travel: Thanks to its portability and temperature retention, the insulated hot pot casserole set is perfect for outdoor events like picnics or road trips. Whether you’re keeping a hot dish like chili or a chilled dessert like fruit salad, it helps maintain your food's ideal temperature while on the go.

Side Dish Storage: Store and serve side dishes such as vegetables, mashed potatoes, or casseroles in the insulated casserole hot pot buffet server dish with Lid, keeping them at the optimal temperature until ready to eat. The space-saving design makes it easy to organize multiple side dishes for a family meal.

Leftovers: After a meal, store your leftover food in the insulated hot pot to preserve its heat or cold for later enjoyment. The superior insulation and 100% food-grade materials keep your food fresh, eliminating the need for constant reheating. Plus, the set is easy to clean and store for future use.
description: Product Description Fionna Insulated Hot Pot Set Bring some elegance to your mealtime with the superb Fionna Hot Pot 3pc set. This terrific trio is the ideal solution to keep your cooked food hot and your fresh food perfectly chilled for hours! With a durable and easy-clean plastic exterior and stainless steel interior, these insulated food containers are made from 100% food grade materials ensuring your meals will always be safe and hygienic to eat whilst retaining their full flavours. Featuring a tastefully decorated finish, they will sit beautifully in any home and serve as the perfect accessory to any mealtime outing. Easy-Grip Handles The Fionna Hot Pots feature sturdy handles integrated into their body, making the containers incredibly easy to carry and transport for a wide range of dining settings. Incredible Insulation Filled with a highly efficient polyurethane insulation, the double walled plastic body and stainless steel inner surface allows them to perfectly preserve the temperature of a dish effectively for hours at a time. The insulation also doubles as a shock absorber, making these pots incredibly durable and resistant to daily knocks and spills. Secure Lids The Fionna Hop Pot set are all equipped with tight-fitting, interlocking lids with large easy-grip handles for ease of use and peace of mind every time. You can rest assured knowing your meals will always be safe and maintained in peak condition for when it is time to present your dishes. Efficient Design Available in three convenient sizes, the Fionna Hot Pot collection will have you covered whether you’re preparing snacks, side dishes or main meals. Due to their efficient construction, they are extremely lightweight and so reduce the load when transporting food, and when not in use they can safely stack on top of each for easy storage. Insulated Hot Pot Set Eat with style These lightweight and easily transportable hot pots add convenience to your day and make on-the-go meal times a more enjoyable and effortless experience for anyone. Whether you’re planning on preparing juicy pasta salads or hot, hearty soups, the containers make the perfect hosts for keeping them in perfect condition, wherever you go. Included in the set is a 1L, 1.5L and 2.5L pot with plenty of space for a filling family meal, and the gracefully ornate design of the Fionna set will have you looking forward to lunchtime intently every day.
